title: elytranthe bibracteolata
intro: Elytranthe bibracteolata, also known as the climbing lantana, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Elytranthe bibracteolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against infections. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and ointments.
